description: Bronze layer lakehouse for Hearst ingestion (schema-enabled)
notes: SCAFFOLD — Real Git sync will regenerate/refine this metadata.
⚠️ CRITICAL: Fabric Deployment Pipelines move METADATA, not DATA.
Tables, rows, and Delta files are NOT promoted between stages.
Each environment (DEV/UAT/PROD) must create its own schema and seed data:
- Via ingestion notebooks (executed per-stage after deployment)
- Via lakehouse shortcuts to stage-specific ADLS/OneLake paths
- Via T-SQL CREATE TABLE scripts in a post-deploy step
Expected schemas: bronze (for raw ingestion), silver (for cleansed data)
